attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
       SDA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID,
    SDA.AE_HEADER_ID,
    SDA.AE_LINE_NUM,
       SDA.APPLICATION_ID,
       COALESCE(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') ACCOUNTING_DATE,
       COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_TRANSFER_DATE,
       SDA.LEDGER_ID,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   ACCOUNTED_CR,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  ACCOUNTED_DR,
       SDA.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE,/* ACCOUNT_CLASS */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE3 AS INVENTORY_ID, /* inventory item id (XAL.ATTRIBUTE12 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 3) */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE2 , /* transaction id (XAL.ATTRIBUTE1 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 2) */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE7,/*previous customer trx line id */  
       SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12 AS OA_ATTRIB_ID,/* offer attribution id */
       SDA.CCID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
       SDA.CURRENCY_CODE,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN SDA.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_CR ,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN SDA.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_DR,
       SDA.DIST_TYPE ,/* Distribution Type */ /* ATTRIBUTE7 IS MODIFIED AS DIST_TYPE BY VKOPPURA */
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,0)  ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  RULE_START_DATE,
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') RULE_END_DATE,
       SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
       CAST(SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DECIMAL(18,8)),
       SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
       SUB_ALL.TRX_CLASS,
       EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,/*top sku's customer transaction id */
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS TRX_LINE_ID , /*customer transaction line id */
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, /* deal id */
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, /* subscription_code */
       'ATTRIBUTED' AS ATTRIBUTION_TYPE ,
       'CG' AS SS_CODE,
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE8 /* (XAL.ATTRIBUTE13 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 8) Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution OM*/
     ,SUB_ALL.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
    ,SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTION_CODE
    ,SUB_ALL.BUNDLE_TYPE
    ,SUB_ALL.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID
   ,'Y' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
  ,SDA.ATTRIBUTE16 AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
FROM   $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL SDA
	 	 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
		 ON (SDA.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
     AND   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO NRS TRANSITION'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US') 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_OA_S XAH
       ON (XAH.AE_HEADER_ID = SDA.AE_HEADER_ID 
	    AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=SDA.APPLICATION_ID
       AND XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A') 
       INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
       ON SDA.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2   
       AND SDA.APPLICATION_ID=SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_ID 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
       ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
     AND SDA.APPLICATION_ID=EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID 

UNION ALL
       SELECT
       SDA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID,
    SDA.AE_HEADER_ID,
    SDA.AE_LINE_NUM,
       SDA.APPLICATION_ID,
       COALESCE(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') ACCOUNTING_DATE,
       COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_TRANSFER_DATE,
       SDA.LEDGER_ID,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   ACCOUNTED_CR,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  ACCOUNTED_DR,
       SDA.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE,
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE3 AS INVENTORY_ID, /* inventory item id (XAL.ATTRIBUTE12 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 3) */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE2, /* transaction id (XAL.ATTRIBUTE1 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 2) */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE7,/*previous customer trx line id */  
       SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12 AS OA_ATTRIB_ID,/* offer attribution id */
       SDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
       SDA.CURRENCY_CODE,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN SDA.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_CR ,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN SDA.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_DR,
       SDA.DIST_TYPE,/* Distribution Type */ /* ATTRIBUTE7 IS MODIFIED AS DIST_TYPE BY VKOPPURA */
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,0)  ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  RULE_START_DATE,
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') RULE_END_DATE,
       SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
       CAST(SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1 AS DECIMAL(18,8)),
       SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
       SUB_ALL.TRX_CLASS,
       EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,/*top sku's customer transaction id */
       COALESCE(SUB_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS TRX_LINE_ID , /*customer transaction line id */
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, /* deal id */
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, /* subscription_code */
       'ATTRIBUTED' AS ATTRIBUTION_TYPE ,
       'CG' AS SS_CODE,
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE8  /* (XAL.ATTRIBUTE13 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 8) Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution OM*/ 
    ,SUB_ALL.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
    ,SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTION_CODE
    ,SUB_ALL.BUNDLE_TYPE
    ,SUB_ALL.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID
   ,'Y' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
  ,SDA.ATTRIBUTE16 AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG    
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_V_OA_S SDA 
	 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
     ON  (SDA.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
	       AND   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO NRS TRANSITION'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US')
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_OA_S XAH
       ON (XAH.AE_HEADER_ID = SDA.AE_HEADER_ID 
	   AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=SDA.APPLICATION_ID
       AND XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A') 
       INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
       ON SDA.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2   
   AND SDA.APPLICATION_ID=SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_ID    
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
       ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
  AND SDA.APPLICATION_ID=EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID

SELECT
       SDA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID,
    SDA.AE_HEADER_ID,
    SDA.AE_LINE_NUM,
       SDA.APPLICATION_ID,
       COALESCE(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') ACCOUNTING_DATE,
       COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_TRANSFER_DATE,
       SDA.LEDGER_ID,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   ACCOUNTED_CR,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  ACCOUNTED_DR,
       SDA.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE,/* SDA.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE IS MODIFIED TO SDA.ACCOUNT_CLASS BY VKOPPURA */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE3 AS INVENTORY_ID, /* inventory item id (XAL.ATTRIBUTE12 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 3) */ /* SDA.ATTRIBUTE 12 IS MODIFIED TO SDA. ATTRIBUTE3 BY VKOPPURA*/
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE2 , /* transaction id (XAL.ATTRIBUTE1 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 2 BY VKOPPURA) */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE7,/*previous customer trx line id */  
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12 AS OA_ATTRIB_ID, /* OA_ATTRIB_ID flowing for offset records as part of Q1FY17 */
       SDA.CCID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID, /* SDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID IS MODIFIED TO SDA.CCID*/
       SDA.CURRENCY_CODE,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN SDA.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_CR ,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN SDA.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_DR,
       SDA.DIST_TYPE ,/* Distribution Type */ /*ATTRIBUTE7 IS MODIFIED BY VKOPPURA */
       COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,0)  ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
       COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
       COALESCE(EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  RULE_START_DATE,  
       COALESCE(EXT_ALL.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') RULE_END_DATE,
       EXT_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
       100 AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
       EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
       EXT_ALL.TRX_CLASS,
       EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,/*customer transaction id */
       EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID, /*customer transaction line id */
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, /* deal id */
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, /*subscription_code */
       'STANDALONE' AS ATTRIBUTION_TYPE , /* NRS transition*/
       'CG' AS SS_CODE,
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE8/* (XAL.ATTRIBUTE13 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 8) Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution OM*/
    ,NULL AS PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
    ,EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTION_CODE
    ,EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9
    ,NULL AS PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID
   ,'Y' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
     ,SDA.ATTRIBUTE16 AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
FROM   $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL SDA
	 	 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
		 ON (SDA.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
      AND   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO NRS TRANSITION'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US') 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_OA_S XAH
       ON (XAH.AE_HEADER_ID = SDA.AE_HEADER_ID
	   AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=SDA.APPLICATION_ID	   
       AND XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A') 
       INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
       ON SDA.ATTRIBUTE2=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2
       AND SDA.APPLICATION_ID=EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
	   AND NOT EXISTS( SEL 1 FROM 
	   $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
	   WHERE 
	   SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
	   AND EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID=SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_ID)
        
UNION ALL
     SELECT
       SDA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID,
    SDA.AE_HEADER_ID,
    SDA.AE_LINE_NUM,
       SDA.APPLICATION_ID,
       COALESCE(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') ACCOUNTING_DATE,
       COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_TRANSFER_DATE,
       SDA.LEDGER_ID,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   ACCOUNTED_CR,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  ACCOUNTED_DR,
       SDA.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE,/*SDA.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE IS MODIFIED TO SDA.ACCOUNT_CLASS */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE3 AS INVENTORY_ID, /* inventory item id (XAL.ATTRIBUTE12 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 3) */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE2, /* transaction id (XAL.ATTRIBUTE1 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 2) */
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE7,/*previous customer trx line id */  /* MODIFIED BY VKOPPURA*/
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12 AS OA_ATTRIB_ID, /* OA_ATTRIB_ID flowing for offset records as part of Q1FY17 */
       SDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, /*SDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID IS MODIFIED AS SDA.CCID */
       SDA.CURRENCY_CODE,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN SDA.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_CR ,
       CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN SDA.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_DR,
       SDA.DIST_TYPE ,/* Distribution Type */ /*ATTRIBUTE7 IS MODIFIED BY VKOPPURA */
       COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,0)  ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
       COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
       COALESCE(EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  RULE_START_DATE,  
       COALESCE(EXT_ALL.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') RULE_END_DATE,
       EXT_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
       100 AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
       EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
       EXT_ALL.TRX_CLASS,
       EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,/*customer transaction id */
       EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID, /*customer transaction line id */
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, /* deal id */
       EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, /*subscription_code */
      'STANDALONE' AS ATTRIBUTION_TYPE , /* NRS transition*/
       'CG' AS SS_CODE,
       SDA.ATTRIBUTE8 /* (XAL.ATTRIBUTE13 CHANGED TO SDA.ATTRIBUTE 8) Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution OM*/
    ,NULL AS PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID
    ,EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTION_CODE
    ,EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9
    ,NULL AS PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID
  ,'Y' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
     ,SDA.ATTRIBUTE16 AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_V_OA_S SDA 
	 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
     ON  (SDA.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
	       AND   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO NRS TRANSITION'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US')   
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_OA_S XAH
       ON (XAH.AE_HEADER_ID = SDA.AE_HEADER_ID 
	   AND XAH.APPLICATION_ID=SDA.APPLICATION_ID
       AND XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A') 
       INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
       ON SDA.ATTRIBUTE2=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2	
AND SDA.APPLICATION_ID=EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
	   AND NOT EXISTS( SEL 1 FROM 
	   $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
	   WHERE 
	   SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
	   AND EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID=SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_ID)

SELECT
    TRANSACTION_DIST_ID
  ,AE_HEADER_ID
  ,AE_LINE_NUM
  ,ST.APPLICATION_ID
  ,CCID
  ,ACCOUNT_CLASS
   ,CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_DR
  ,CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS ENTERED_CR 
  ,CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  ACCOUNTED_DR
  ,CASE WHEN DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END   ACCOUNTED_CR
  ,DIST_TYPE
  ,CURRENCY_CODE
  ,EXCHANGE_DATE
  ,EXCHANGE_RATE
  ,CONVERSION_TYPE
  ,ATTRIBUTE2
  ,ATTRIBUTE3
  ,ATTRIBUTE4
  ,ATTRIBUTE7
  ,ATTRIBUTE8
   ,GL_DATE
  ,LEDGER_ID
   ,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
  ,ST.GLOBAL_NAME
  ,CREATE_DATETIME
  ,DIST_BAL_TYPE
  ,ELEMENT_TYPE
   ,AMOUNT
,ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT 
,ACTION_CODE  
,'RI'AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
,'Y' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,ST.ATTRIBUTE16 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL ST
  INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR 
      ON ( ST.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID AND
	    UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO NRS TRANSITION'
      AND EFAR.LANG = 'US')   
	  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_XLA_SAAS_OA_INCR WI
      WHERE WI.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID=ST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AND WI.APPLICATION_ID=ST.APPLICATION_ID)
